title: 课程评价 NLP 情感分析
subtitle: 好评/差评挖掘、分词与词云

chapters.title: 读取评论与标签分布
chapters.content: 看好评/差评/中性占比并做可视化。

codeExamples.title: 分布图
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-reviews.csv')
print(df['label'].value_counts())
df['label'].value_counts().plot(kind='pie', autopct='%.1f%%')
plt.ylabel(''); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

selfCheckQuestions.question: value_counts() 可以看到各标签的样本量。

chapters.title: 分词与关键词统计
chapters.content: 使用 jieba（不可用时按字切分）统计词频。

selfCheckQuestions.question: 中文分词最常用的第三方库是？

chapters.title: 词云与简单情感打分
chapters.content: 好差评分别取高频词；尽量加载 wordcloud 做图。

codeExamples.title: 词云
codeExamples.code:
import pandas as pd; from collections import Counter
df = pd.read_csv('sample-reviews.csv')
try:
    import jieba
    tok = lambda s: list(jieba.cut(s))
except Exception:
    tok = lambda s: list(s)
pos = ' '.join(df.loc[df['label']=='好评','text'])
neg = ' '.join(df.loc[df['label']=='差评','text'])
print('【好评 Top 15】', Counter(tok(pos)).most_common(15))
print('【差评 Top 15】', Counter(tok(neg)).most_common(15))
try:
    from wordcloud import WordCloud; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
    wc = WordCloud(background_color='white', width=700, height=350).generate(pos)
    plt.figure(figsize=(9,4)); plt.imshow(wc, interpolation='bilinear'); plt.axis('off'); plt.title('好评词云'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()
except Exception as e:
    print('(wordcloud 不可用)', e)

selfCheckQuestions.question: 快速计数的内置类是 collections.____

exercises.prompt: 输出 1 星评价的 Top 10 词。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; from collections import Counter
df = pd.read_csv('sample-reviews.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
texts = df.loc[df['rating']==1,'text']
try:
    import jieba
    tok = lambda s: list(jieba.cut(s))
except Exception:
    tok = lambda s: list(s)
flat = [w for t in texts for w in tok(t)]
print(Counter(flat).most_common(10))

exercises.prompt: 绘制不同评分的评论数柱状图。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd; import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
df = pd.read_csv('sample-reviews.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
df['rating'].value_counts().sort_index().plot(kind='bar', color='#2563eb')
plt.xlabel('评分'); plt.ylabel('评论数'); plt.tight_layout(); plt.show()

exercises.prompt: 基于正负词表打情感分，输出各标签平均分。
exercises.starterCode:
import pandas as pd
df = pd.read_csv('sample-reviews.csv')
exercises.sampleAnswer:
pos = ['清晰','细','丰富','好','推荐','入门','实战']
neg = ['难','差','bug','太快','不细','错']
def score(text):
    return sum(text.count(w) for w in pos) - sum(text.count(w) for w in neg)
df['score'] = df['text'].apply(score)
print('整体平均:', df['score'].mean().round(2))
print(df.groupby('label')['score'].mean().round(2))

wordcloud 不可用时，Counter 输出的词频也能给结论。
